get.description: Return 200 if the app and database are reachable, 503 otherwise.

delete.description: Revokes every active refresh token for the authenticated user.
Permanently deletes the account and all associated data. Irreversible.

patch.description: Submit first_name, last_name, and email. Sets is_profile_complete=true. Can be called again to update.

parameters.name: date_from

schema.description: Filter on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD)
schema.title: Date From

parameters.description: Filter on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: date_to

schema.description: Filter on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD)
schema.title: Date To

parameters.description: Filter on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: type

schema.description: Filter by transaction type: income | expense
schema.title: Type

parameters.description: Filter by transaction type: income | expense

get.description: Returns income/expense totals and a per-category breakdown. Supports the same date range filters as the transaction list.
Streams a CSV file of all transactions matching the given filters. No row limit.

category_id.title: Category Id
category_id.description: Category to budget for. Omit (null) for an overall spending budget.

spent.title: Spent
spent.description: Total expenses this month for this budget's scope

remaining.title: Remaining
remaining.description: amount - spent, can be negative if over budget

BudgetRead.title: BudgetRead
BudgetRead.description: Budget with live utilization for the current calendar month.

email.title: Email
email.description: Email address to send the OTP to

TransactionReadDetail.title: TransactionReadDetail
TransactionReadDetail.description: Extended read schema that includes joined relations.

TransactionSummary.title: TransactionSummary
TransactionSummary.description: Aggregated spending/income summary for a user.

phone_number.title: Phone Number
phone_number.description: Optional contact phone number — not used for authentication

UserProfileUpdate.title: UserProfileUpdate
UserProfileUpdate.description: Body for PATCH /users/me — all fields optional so partial updates work.

email.title: Email
email.description: Email address used to request the OTP
